REGISTER.HOW_TO_GET_API_KEY: How to get the API Key?

STEPS.1: Step 1: After clicking the link, tap the menu icon (three bars).
STEPS.2: Step 2: Tap to sign in. If you don't have an account, go to Create Account.
STEPS.3: Step 3: After signing in, go to the "About" section.
STEPS.7: Step 7: Press and hold your API Key.
STEPS.8: Step 8: Tap "Copy" and return to the app.

HOME.END_OF_LIST: You have reached the end of the list!

EDIT_USER.CONFIRM_DELETE_ACCOUNT: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

SCANNER.DECK_FOUND_MESSAGE:
Deck ID: {id}!

MASTER_VAULT.SAVE_ERROR: Failed to save deck. Please try again.
MASTER_VAULT.TITLE: Master Vault

STEPS.1: Step 1: Read all instructions and click "Ok, copy and continue".
STEPS.2: Step 2: Click the three-bar menu as shown.
STEPS.4: Step 4: After logging in, click on the highlighted area.
STEPS.5: Step 5: Scroll down and paste your ID.
STEPS.6: Step 6: Confirm the ID and click "Add Deck".
STEPS.7: Step 7: Click "Go to Deck" to add it to the Master Vault.
STEPS.8: Step 8: On the deck page, click the save icon.
STEPS.9: Step 9: Wait a few moments until it completes.
STEPS.10: Step 10: You will be redirected to the user page with your deck.
